name: Bachelor's Tuxedo
description: Notes Using your ability will change your skin to the Eligible Bachelor skin for 30 seconds, which will reset to the actual skin you have equipped after 30 seconds (with a 30 second cooldown after), or every time you change zones.
effects: Halloween Costume: On ability use, dress up as Eligible Bachelor Rogue for 60 seconds! Secret Power: On ability use, consume 1/4th of your candy-filled meter to activate a secret power! Aura of Wealth: Create a coin summon that blasts nearby enemies for 500-600 damage in 6 bursts. Secret Power Cooldown: 180 seconds
